item.name: Mizuhiki
item.description:
A fish of good fortune, said to strongly resemble white and red cords commonly used to wrap gifts in Hingashi.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A fish of white and crimson named for its resemblance to the rice paper cords traditionally used to wrap gifts in Hingashi. Those who manage to hook one of these decorative creatures are said to be blessed with good fortune.
